name: Eternal Kinstone
desc_clean: Wurmkin 1 Once the Wurmkin have completed their kinstone, they commit that knowledge to a cairn.
mechanic_summary: Eternal Kinstone to Spell klanu Wurmkin. Wurmkin 1 Once the Wurmkin have completed their kinstone, they commit that knowledge to a cairn. Keywords: brak.
wiki_desc: Wurmkin 1 Once the Wurmkin have completed their kinstone, they commit that knowledge to a cairn. "Truth, Forever" as they put it. Do you think they account for the truths that rip you open inside? No, they put a stone in a crypt for all to see and to know. For all eternity, damn the consequences. Some things are best left forgotten.
